title: Feylis Ardele
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:FeylisArdele1.png]] |name=Feylis Ardele |homeworld=[[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blond]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Commenor Militia]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] **[[Alliance Starfighter Corps/Legends|Alliance Starfighter Corps]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Feylis Ardele''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]'s famous [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== ===Going Rogue=== {{Quote|I… uh… was a member of the Commenor Militia. They used the 'eyeball' exclusively for training… in preparation for entrance to the Imperial Naval Academy. But I never attended the academy! I hate the Empire! I—|Feylis Ardele to Derek "Hobbie" Klivian|[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 13|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 13]]}} Feylis Ardele was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]][[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 17|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 17]] who saw her family [[Death|killed]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] when a business rival of her [[Feylis Ardele's father|father's]] accused them of sympathizing with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].{{InsiderCite|59|Who's Who in Rogue Squadron}} A veteran of the [[Commenor Militia]][[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''Star Wars Handbook'' 1: ''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'']] by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' she was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance Starfighter Corps/Legends|Rebel Alliance Starfighter Corps]][[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 3|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 3]] shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].''[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 1]]'' She was with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] at that [[Time/Legends|time]] along with a group of other [[Rebel pilot/Legends|pilots]], all of whom had volunteered to join the legendary [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. The pilots were briefed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance's]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] until [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] joined them, at which point Antilles ordered the hopefuls to get to their [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], feeling he needed to "stretch his wings." Ardele was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Cadet/Legends|cadet]] around seven [[Standard month/Legends|months]] later,''[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 2]]'' at which time she was officially recruited into Rogue Squadron. Her appointment came on the advice of [[Firstpilot]] [[Rekush]], one of Ackbar's trusted [[Aide/Legends|aides]]. As a skilled [[TIE pilot|TIE fighter pilot]], Ardele struck [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] as someone who could take on the Rogues in daily [[Flight simulator/Legends|simulations]], and who could also enlighten them about recent advancements in the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]]. The [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] Militia had exclusively trained with [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] in order to prepare its graduates for the [[Imperial Naval Academy/Legends|Imperial Naval Academy]], but as Ardele had no love for the Empire, she never enlisted. Nonetheless, her TIE experience and the militia's relationship with the Empire made her nervous around her new squadron mates when she joined Rogue Squadron. After one simulator run, Rogue veteran [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek "Hobbie" Klivian]] reassured Ardele that several of them were Imperial-trained and that none of them held her experience against her; he also expressed admiration that she had nearly bested him. In that simulation, she had also destroyed the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing fighter]] of another Rogue veteran: [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]]. As the squadron unwound after the simulation, Ardele and [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo|Plour Ilo]] watched as fellow Rogues [[Nrin Vakil]] and [[Ibtisam]] argued over the future of [[Starfighter combat/Legends|starfighter combat]]. Ardele suggested that their enmity would escalate within a [[Standard week/Legends|week]], but Ilo's take was precluded by the arrival of [[Gror Pernon]], [[Grand Duke]] of her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Eiattu 6]]. [[File:Feylissregret.jpg|thumb|left|175px|Feylis Ardele reassures Rogue Squadron that she hates the Empire.]] Pernon revealed that Ilo was really Isplourrdacartha Estillo, Eiattu 6's lost [[Princess/Legends|princess]], and he hoped that she could talk her [[Harrandatha Estillo|brother]] out of [[People's Liberation Battalion|rebelling]] against the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Priamsta|ruling nobles]] in the [[Eiattu Civil War]]. Rogue Squadron's [[Eiattu Campaign|mission]] to Eiattu 6 saw Ardele and several other Rogues explore a [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] on the backs of native [[Thuvasaur]]s, only to encounter a group of Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. During the subsequent [[lightfight]], Vakil raged over the death of his steed, and Ardele tried to keep him focused on everyone who was still alive. He carelessly walked into an exploding TIE [[Snubfighter/Legends|fighter]] anyway, when air support arrived from Antilles and [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]].[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 14|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 14]] Vakil survived, and the Rogues were joined by the Eiattu rebels, who finished off the Imperial [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]]. Back at the rebel base, Ardele and her fellow pilots were taken in by Ilo's charismatic brother; concurrently in [[Eiattu 6's capital city]], Ilo publicly declared her support for the insurgents. When the rest of the Rogues rejoined her there, Ardele and Ibtisam argued for the rebel cause, while Vakil and [[Herian I'ngre]] maintained that the planet's citizens owed their peace and prosperity to the [[Noble/Legends|nobles]]. Antilles kept them on task, however, and sent them back to the jungle to investigate the Empire's presence onworld.[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 15|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 15]] Armed with [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]], the Rogues set out on foot, but Vakil was once again caught in an explosion when an Imperial [[gray noise generator]] blew up. He was left in the [[Swamp/Legends|swamp]] to die while Ardele, Ibtisam, I'ngre, Klivian, Janson, and [[Dllr Nep]] were captured by [[Scout trooper/Legends|biker scouts]]. [[Prisoner/Legends|Imprisoned]] by Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Leonia Tavira]], the Rogues learned that Ilo's brother was dead, with the Rebel leader an unwitting [[Harrandatha Estillo (impostor)|impostor]]. They were soon rescued by Vakil, who had survived by easily breathing under[[Water/Legends|water]] in the swamp, while Ilo simultaneously exposed the charlatan at the [[Imperial Citadel (Eiattu 6)|Imperial Citadel]].[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 16|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 16]] Ardele and her fellows fired [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] at Tavira's departing [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], but the Moff was able to flee the planet with some stolen [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. As Rogue Squadron prepared to leave as well, Ilo elected to remain behind and help her homeworld recover from the Empire's machinations. The Rogues headed straight for the [[Malrev system/Legends|Malrev system]] in search of the ''[[Starfaring]]'', a missing [[Passenger liner/Legends|passenger liner]], which Antilles believed would be an overall uneventful [[Malrev incident|mission]]. He hoped that it would primarily give Ardele and the squadron's other new pilots a chance to become more acquainted with rest of the squadron. ===The Malrev incident=== {{Quote|Mission accomplished, Rogues.''"
"''But at what cost, Captain?''"
"''One that is all too common, Feylis… and harder to bear each time it must be paid.|Ardele and Wedge Antilles, following the death of Dllr Nep and Herian I'ngre|[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 20|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 20]]}} As Rogue Squadron entered the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] of [[Malrev IV]], Nep began to hear [[Music/Legends|music]] and followed it to its source, only for the pilots to be ambushed by TIE fighters. Antilles's fighter was downed by the surprise attack, but unexpected [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] fire from the ground helped the rest of the Rogues win the day. Although they lost track of their downed Rogue Leader, they followed the [[Laser/Legends|laser]] fire to its source: the ''Starfaring'' and its missing [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] passengers, set up in a clearing in the [[Forest/Legends|woods]]. Their new allies built them a [[Fire/Legends|campfire]] and promised to help them search for Antilles in the morning. Ardele expressed incredulity that, with their leader missing, Janson and Klivian could gleefully watch a performance by some dancing Bothan women around the fire. Shortly afterward, she watched as the two veteran Rogues quickly sprang into action to help Vakil [[Unarmed combat/Legends|brawl]] with some jealous Bothan men. The melee was interrupted by the arrival of [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]]-toting [[Irrukiine]], a species indigenous to the planet, which quickly forced the Rogues and Bothans back into a partnership. Ardele blasted one foe away from Klivian with her [[Rifle/Legends|rifle]], and gave another one a swift kick, but Vakil quickly realized how outnumbered they were and rushed to his [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]].[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 18|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 18]] [[File:Sarahconnor.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Ardele and Klivian battle Irrukiine on Malrev IV.]] Ardele shouted for everyone to take cover as the starfighter swooped in and slaughtered the attackers, and the rest of the night was spent with both Rogues and Bothans taking turns standing watch over their camp. Aboard the grounded ''Starfaring'' the next morning, Ibtisam told Ardele about an emotional [[Dream/Legends|dream]] she had had about Vakil, and Ardele remarked that a number of the Rogues had been displaying heightened emotions since arriving on Malrev IV. Nep in particular was still fixated on the music that only he could hear, and as he led the Rogues and Bothans through the forest in search of Antilles, the music took him to a [[Sith Temple (Malrev IV)|Sith temple]] that was guarded by more Irrukiine. With their attacks coordinated by the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] [[Cartariun]], the Irrukiine forced their foes to fall back, and the sudden appearance of Antilles firing dual blasters helped them flee to safety. A recent captive of Cartariun, the Rogue Leader had escaped the [[Sith temple/Legends|temple]] during the confusion of the battle—Nep, however, was captured in his stead. Back at camp, Ardele remained behind with several other Rogues while Antilles, Celchu and Janson performed a reconnaissance flyby of the temple.[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 19|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 19]] When the three airborne Rogues were attacked by [[Qâzoi Kyantuska|mind-controlled]] Irrukiine in TIE fighters, they called for backup, and Ardele instructed the Bothans to prepare for a potential [[Ground warfare/Legends|ground assault]] while she quickly boarded her fighter. The sheer number of TIEs arrayed against them overwhelmed the Rogues, and Ardele lost a [[Stabilizer/Legends|stabilizer]] and her [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|Artoo unit]], prompting Antilles to order her back to base. She protested, feeling she could still do some damage, but she ultimately obeyed the order. [[Force sense/Legends|Sensing]] her departure, Cartariun directed two of his pilots to pursue. [[File:Feylistakesdamage.jpg|thumb|left|175px|Ardele gets knocked out of a battle against mind-controlled foes.]] The pursuers, and all of the Irrukiine pilots, lost their coordination when the captive Nep broke Cartariun's concentration, and the Rogues were able to easily finish off their opponents. Back at home base, Ardele checked up on the injured Klivian and I'ngre, discovering that the latter had suffered a [[Brain/Legends|brain]] injury in the earlier ground battle with the Irrukiine. When Antilles arrived and received Ardele's report, I'ngre told him that Nep was using Cartariun's [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith magic]] to link with her mind, and that he insisted the Sith temple be destroyed. Meanwhile, the Bothans' leader [[Girov Dza'tey]] had been seduced by the power of the temple and had fled the camp to challenge Cartariun. When Antilles confronted Dza'tey's [[Girov Dza'tey's second-in-command|second-in-command]] aboard the ''Starfaring'', Ardele and Celchu stood outside the room with [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]] drawn, but the Bothan reassured Antilles that he would back up the Rogues with a ground assault on the temple. Ardele piloted I'ngre's X-wing for the operation, and the Rogues found themselves flying against TIE fighters and [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|interceptors]]—the Irrukiine were now controlled by Dza'tey, who had killed Cartariun and seized the temple's power for himself. Although the Rogues hoped to be able to save Nep, Antilles insisted that they needed to overwhelm Dza'tey's concentration and allow the Bothan ground forces to break through. In the midst of the chaos, Ardele spotted her own damaged fighter, which I'ngre had boarded after fleeing her [[Medcenter/Legends|hospital]] [[Sleeper (furniture)|bed]]. Dza'tey directed half of his fleet to pursue her, but just at that moment, Plourr Ilo arrived with a squadron of [[Z-95-AF4 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] from Eiattu. I'ngre, who was communicating [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathically]] with Dllr Nep, proceeded to the temple—Nep was still inside the temple with Dza'tey and believed that the battle could only be won if a new element were introduced to catch Dza'tey off guard. I'ngre's arrival did just that, destroying the temple and ending the mind-control of the Irrukiine. The day was won, but at the cost of two squadron members' lives. Ardele and Antilles mourned the loss of Nep and I'ngre as they flew away from the smoking ruin, and back at their campsite, they shared another campfire with their Bothan allies. Ilo rejoined Rogue Squadron,[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 21|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 21]] and Ardele later fell in love with fellow Rogue [[Avan Beruss]], although they hid their relationship from public knowledge. Ardele's later campaigns as a Rogue included the [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brentaal IV]] and the [[Evacuation of Ciutric]]. ==Appearances== {{ScrollBox|content=
